title: Database connection timeouts affecting user logins
description: Users experiencing 30+ second delays when attempting to log in. Database connection pool appears to be exhausted during peak hours.

notes.author: John Smith
notes.content: Initial investigation shows connection pool at 95% utilization

notes.author: John Smith
notes.content: Scaling up database connection pool from 50 to 100 connections

notes.author: John Smith
notes.content: Performance improved but still monitoring. May need to optimize slow queries.
